subject: Add simplification documentation and remaining work tracking
body:
This commit adds comprehensive documentation about the pricing calculator simplification:

1. SIMPLIFICATION_SUMMARY.md
   - Details what changed from complex to simple
   - Documents the new 5-model approach
   - Explains the equilibrium analysis concept
   - Provides before/after comparison
   - Lists files modified/created

2. TODO_REMAINING_WORK.md
   - Tracks completed work (core models, calculations, results display)
   - Lists remaining UI integration tasks
   - Provides testing checklist
   - Includes quick implementation guide
   - Describes expected final user experience

Core simplification is complete:
✅ Models reduced from 20 to 5
✅ Static unit economics (no growth projections)
✅ Seller/buyer/equilibrium analysis implemented
✅ SA pricing defaults created
✅ New results display component built
✅ README updated

Remaining work:
⏳ Update UI (index.html, forms.js, initialization.js)
⏳ Update charts for static data
⏳ Remove unused files
⏳ End-to-end testing
title: Add simplification documentation and remaining work tracking
